version_description: This is the easier version of the original song and it sounds really good..

versions.version_description: Complete and well-aligned chords / intermediate version with split chords and suggestions for playable voicings.

Inversions used to support melody. The bass track disguises the chords underneath at times. The two solos are quite distinct and in different keys, the former played over the verse, and the latter being a half step up to Gb. Outro solo cycles over those four chords repeated to fade.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Youve Got To Hide Your Love Away
Picassos Last Words Drink To Me

content:
CAPO 3RD FRETH

VERSE
                   Em7   A7     Bm-Bm/A-G 
I can wait another day until I call you
[tab]       [ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]F#7[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]A7[/ch]
Youve only got my heart on a string and everything a flutter[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]A7[/ch]
But another lonley night (and another, and another)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch] - [ch]Bm/A[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]
Might take forever(and another, and another)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]F#7[/ch]
Weve only got each other to blame[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch] - [ch]Bm/A[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]

CHORUS
[tab]         [ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Cause I know what I feel to be right[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]
No more lonely nights[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]

VERSE
May I never miss the thrill of being near you
And if it takes a couple of years
To turn your tears to laughter

CHORUS
I will do what I feel to be right
No more lonely nights
Never be another
No more lonely nights
Youre my guiding light
Day or night I'm always there

BRIDGE
[tab]    [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
And I wont go away until you tell me so[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A7sus4[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]

SOLO: same chords of verse.
     
CHORUS
Yes I know what I feel to be right
No more lonely nights

No more lonely nights
Youre my guiding light
Day or night I'm always there

I wont go away until you tell me so
No I'll never go away
[tab]               [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
No more lonely nights, no no...[/tab]

END: Fm
